headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies took a thrilling 11-9 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Kyle Schwarber's dominant performance. The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, with Zack Littell earning the win after 5.0 IP of scoreless relief. The Detroit Tigers outlasted the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2, with Andrés Giménez collecting 1 hit and 2 RBI for the Blue Jays. The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought 7-6 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Matt McLain leading the Reds' offense.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, affecting their teams' lineups. Matt Waldron has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right brachialis muscle injury with the San Diego Padres. Blake Snell is on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 12, 2026, with a left elbow loose bodies issue with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Chase Dollander has been placed on the 15-day injured list with a right elbow strain with the Colorado Rockies. Cal Raleigh is on the 10-day injured list with a right oblique strain with the Seattle Mariners.

Several trades and roster moves have taken place. The Baltimore Orioles acquired RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash. The Athletics traded LHP José Suarez to the Seattle Mariners for cash. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded OF Jose Requena to the Arizona Diamondbacks for CF Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Win Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, securing an 11-9 victory. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a dominant performance, going 3-for-5 with 2 home runs and 5 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, with Zack Littell earning the win after 5.0 IP of scoreless relief.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2 in a closely contested game. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays' offense with 1 hit and 2 RBI, while Trey Yesavage pitched 6 strong innings for the Blue Jays, striking out 6 and allowing 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Guardians in Thrilling 7-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a hard-fought win over the Cleveland Guardians, outlasting their opponents by a single run. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Padres Place Waldron on 15-Day IL**
top_news.summary: San Diego Padres right-hander Matt Waldron has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right brachialis muscle injury.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Eduarniel Núñez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash.
